monitors.name: entropy-watcher
monitors.description: Flags stale EXECUTING sessions that have chained many tool calls without returning to reflection.

monitors.name: drift-watcher
monitors.description: Flags sessions that remain in DRIFTING until an explicit prompt or scope update resolves the deferred-topic hit.

monitors.name: archivist
monitors.description: Rotates stale insights, handoffs, and session records, then vacuums low-confidence Q-table rows.
